Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_A: The generative model output assumes a normalized Euclidean distribution based on statistical averages, resulting in Ontological Flattening.
Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_B: Traditional prompting lacks mechanisms to verify physical plausibility or track the provenance of the training data influence.
Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_C: Standard displays cannot represent the required fidelity of specialized generative outputs, requiring theoretical cross-modal integration.
Hickam_Orientation.LENS: Latent Space as Navigable Topology: Treating generation not as text-to-image correlation, but as a directed graph traversal through specific non-Euclidean manifolds governed by Epistemic Rules.

Contrastive_Delta.Pre_State: App acted as a symbol-composition utility lacking causal control over complex scene synthesis and geometric parameterization.
Contrastive_Delta.Post_State: App integrates Project Aurelius via Semantic Parallax Zones, providing prototype APIs to sculpt non-Euclidean latent spaces, implement agentic prompt debiasing, and request hyper-spectral rendering profiles.
Contrastive_Delta.Isomorphic_Bridge: Complex multi-dimensional architectural directives (Phantom Dimensions) are translated purely client-side into structured GenAI prompts, maintaining SIC 2.1 Compliance without backend servers.

Martensite_Metrics.Aesthetic_Tension: Introduction of highly abstract geometric and ethical reasoning loops into a previously simple symbol selection interface.
Martensite_Metrics.Intent_Divergence: Diverges from generic 'prompt enhancers' by treating the prompt as a causal vector that explicitly targets physical constraints and data provenance.
